message:
feat(web): enhance worker system with PCA and off-main-thread compute

ComputeOrchestrator (ComputeOrchestrator.ts):
- Add genomic signature PCA API for off-main-thread computation
- Add computeKmerVectorWithSharedBuffer for efficient k-mer analysis
- Add computeGenomicSignaturePca for PCA on k-mer frequency vectors
- Add computeBiasDecomposition for AT/GC/purine-pyrimidine skew analysis
- Add computePhasePortrait for genome dynamics visualization
- Implement worker creation fallback for browsers without module workers
- Use SharedArrayBuffer for zero-copy sequence transfer when available
- Add proper type imports for PCA-related interfaces

analysis.worker.ts:
- Add Comlink-exposed API for all new analysis types
- Implement computeKmerVector, computeGenomicSignaturePca,
  computeBiasDecomposition, computePhasePortrait handlers
- Add SharedSequencePool integration for efficient sequence sharing
- Handle Float32Array transfer for PCA matrix data
- Add comprehensive error handling and result formatting

comparison.worker.ts:
- Add jobId to comparison requests for request/response correlation
- Include jobId in worker response messages
- Enables proper handling of concurrent comparison requests

hilbert.worker.ts:
- Add CGR (Chaos Game Representation) computation support
- Add k-mer frequency computation via WASM
- Implement Hilbert curve visualization for CGR data
- Add palette configuration for visualization customization

gpu/GPUCompute.ts:
- Add WebGPU fallback for systems without full GPU compute
- Improve buffer management and error handling
- Add support for larger compute workloads

WorkerPreloader.ts:
- Improve module worker detection and fallback logic
- Add better error messages for worker initialization failures

types.ts:
- Add KmerVectorRequest, GenomicSignaturePcaRequest types
- Add BiasDecompositionRequest, PhasePortraitRequest types
- Add BiasDecompositionWorkerResult interface
- Expand AnalysisType union with new analysis variants

Test additions:
- complexity-wasm-parity.test.ts: WASM vs JS parity tests for complexity
- hilbert-cgr-wasm-parity.test.ts: WASM vs JS parity tests for CGR

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
